helix_modules.detail: Dark matching grid — MIRRA book port; private match before canonical commit.
Intent resolver — commerce/capital/nano intents simulate routes before execution.
Net settlement — opposing flows cancel; only net delta exported to committer.
Synthetic pairs — virtual pair registry scaffold for internal derivatives.
Latency arb mesh — spread scan via arbitrage_core producer loop extension.
Liquidity graph — unified venue routing over AMM + book + perp scaffolds.
Encrypted tunnels — AVR-gated path metadata scaffold (audit scope item).
Predictive oracle — liquidity stress / slippage forecast hook to FMA inference.
IMM core — dynamic spread + inventory from quant_stack FMA book depth.
Continuous kernel — always-on helixd tick loop replacing 3-tick producer scaffold.
